M125 Lane A PR · #1531 + #1528

Two opt-in detection-driven additions: weekly watcher for Vercel Labs upstream pins, and auto-suggesting emulators from package.json. Both fail-soft: missing skills are skipped, unmapped deps ignored.

#1531 · Version watcher (scripts/check-labs-versions.mjs)

      

    


    
    

      
#1528 · emulate auto-discovery
